title: hepetis iridiflora
intro: Hepetis iridiflora, also known as Chinese Chrysanthemum or Iridoglaucium, is a plant species native to Asia and used in traditional medicine. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hepetis iridiflora include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and calming the nervous system. Hepetis iridiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
